---
title: "capture_massive_crypto_reference"
format: gfm
---

# Summary

- run id: `massive_crypto_reference_example`
- provider: `massive`
- capture type: `crypto_reference`
- status: `success`
- records captured: `3`

# Context

- bounded first-pass Massive reference and snapshot capture
- canonical SQL truth remains authoritative
- raw payloads are preserved and replayable

# Health

- endpoint: `/v3/reference/tickers`
- healthy: `true`
- status code: `200`
- latency ms: `143.2`

# Evidence

- `config.json`
- `capture_summary.json`
- `report.qmd`
